scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc -b lib/api-client-react/tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @workspace/web typecheck
scripts.validate: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
